news:news.news:title: Iran's intelligence minister was killed in an air strike, escalating tensions in the region as oil prices approach $110 a barrel.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East tensions, Iran air strike, Ecuador gang violence, environmental conservation, legal proceedings in Europe

news:news.news:title: The Federal Reserve maintains interest rates amid rising inflation concerns linked to the Iran conflict, while Trump seeks to lower oil prices through regulatory changes.
news:news.news:keywords: Federal Reserve interest rates, Trump oil price regulations, Starbucks union negotiations, CBS News worker protests, media industry changes

news:news.news:title: The FBI is purchasing Americans' location data without warrants, raising privacy concerns, while Amazon defends its USPS shipping cuts amid financial struggles for the postal service.
news:news.news:keywords: FBI location data privacy concerns, Amazon USPS shipping cuts, Section 230 internet law reform, Robinhood social media platform, AI and health technology misconceptions

news:news.news:title: Giannis Antetokounmpo refuses to be shut down by the Bucks, while Messi reaches a milestone of 900 career goals.
news:news.news:keywords: Giannis Antetokounmpo injury update, Andy Dalton trade news, Lionel Messi career milestones, NFL replacement referees, Masters dinner menu highlights

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a hidden granite mass in Antarctica, insights into feathered dinosaurs, and breakthroughs in quantum physics and exoplanet research.
news:news.news:keywords: hidden granite mass in Antarctica, feathered dinosaurs flight capabilities, James Webb Space Telescope discoveries, quantum physics advancements, social behavior in bull sharks

news:news.news:title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'.
news:news.news:keywords: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course', Death of Ali Larijani deepens crisis at heart of Iran's leadership, Total repression and air strikes bring unrelenting dread for Iranians, Spanish king reopens debate on conquest of Mexico by acknowledging 'abuse', Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC

news:news.news:title: Oil and gas prices rise again after Iran attacks production facilities.
news:news.news:keywords: Oil and gas prices rise again after Iran attacks production facilities, Kid Rock decries settlement reached between Live Nation and Trump’s justice department, Starbucks shareholders push to oust board members over stalled union talks, Democrats urge windfall tax as big oil set to make billions from Iran war, CBS News workers hold 24-hour walkout for new contract

news:news.news:title: I went to the Pentagon to watch Pete Hegseth scold war reporters.
news:news.news:keywords: I went to the Pentagon to watch Pete Hegseth scold war reporters, The Beats Studio Pro are nearly $200 off ahead of Amazon’s big spring sale, Remedy’s live-service shooter Firebreak is getting its final major update, Spotify adds ‘Exclusive Mode’ audiophile feature for Windows PCs, Ikea tried to build a smart home for everyone — here’s why it’s not working yet

news:news.news:title: WBC champs! Takeaways as Venezuela stuns Team USA.
news:news.news:keywords: WBC champs! Takeaways as Venezuela stuns Team USA, Venezuela outduels USA to capture 1st WBC title, Texas marches on thanks to Mark's late winner, NFLPA elects former OL Tretter as next director, Howard checks last box with first NCAAT win

news:news.news:keywords: JWST reveals a strange sulfur world unlike any planet we know, This massive crater could expose the heart of a lost planet, Scientists just discovered bull sharks have friends, NASA’s Webb captures a bizarre brain-shaped nebula around a dying star, The smell of Egyptian mummies is revealing 2,000-year-old secrets
